mapper.select: SELECT BOOK_ID, TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, PRICE, PUBLISHED_DATE, DESCRIPTION, REG_DATE, UPD_DATE, DELETE_YN FROM BOOK WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
SELECT BOOK_ID, TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, PRICE, PUBLISHED_DATE, DESCRIPTION, REG_DATE, UPD_DATE, DELETE_YN FROM BOOK WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK SET TITLE = #{title}, AUTHOR = #{author}, PUBLISHER = #{publisher}, PRICE = #{price}, PUBLISHED_DATE = #{publishedDate}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, UPD_DATE = NOW() WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE BOOK SET DELETE_YN = 'Y', UPD_DATE = NOW() WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
